title: PiP Youtube
body:
**This mod adds youtube PiP player! You can resize it and change position as you like**

Default menu key: **H**

![Player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/879a9c46ea18f9a92c6f3a4526a113f17d21ca03_0.webp)

**_Note that sometimes after opening menu your cursor can bug out. Just open and close chat to fix it_**
